cases.title: Balanced optimizer case for references/auth.md
cases.prompt: Design Better Auth integration for a multi-organization API. Trace server construction, adapter ownership, session lookup, organization membership and resource authorization, plugin order, trusted origins, cookies, migrations, test isolation, and safe client exposure. Distinguish authentication from authorization and do not copy an adapter API that the installed version does not export.
rubric: Makes ownership and version boundaries explicit before proposing code.
Separates verified APIs, repository evidence, pseudocode, and unresolved claims.
Includes failure signatures, deliberate exclusions, and executable verification.
cases.rationale: Provides the missing optimizer split with a decision-complete scenario rather than a suffix-only prompt variant.
